nodes.name: Group Alerts by Agent and Rule
Sticky Note - Schedule
nodes.notes:
DAILY SCHEDULE

Runs every 4 hours

Fetches all alerts from Data Table, then:
1. Filters for unprocessed (processed = "0")
2. Groups by AGENT + RULE_ID
   (Each unique rule on each agent is analyzed separately)

Expected fields:
- agent_name, agent_ip, agent_id
- rule_id, rule_level, rule_description
- alert_data, timestamp
- processed ("0" or "1")
- raw_body (full JSON)

nodes.name: Sticky Note - AI
nodes.notes:
AI ANALYSIS LOOP

Processes EACH agent+rule group separately:
- Nodes set to "runOnceForEachItem" mode
- HTTP Request uses batchSize=1 (one API call per item)
- Each group gets its own AI analysis
- Max tokens: 4000 (increased to prevent truncation)

If you have 5 groups, this will make 5 API calls.

Analyzes:
- Alert patterns for that specific rule
- Frequency and timing correlations
- True/False positives for that rule type
- Known false positive patterns

Make sure OpenRouter credentials are configured!

nodes.name: Sticky Note - Report
nodes.notes:
ROBUST AI RESPONSE PARSING

Multi-strategy parser handles:
1. Standard JSON parsing
2. Auto-fixes common JSON errors (missing braces, trailing commas)
3. Progressive parsing (finds longest valid JSON if truncated)
4. Regex field extraction if JSON completely fails
5. Validates and fills missing fields

HTML REPORT

Generates professional HTML email with:
- Summary statistics (unique agents, rules, alerts)
- Detailed table with one row per AGENT+RULE combo
- Verdicts and recommendations for each

Update email address in Send Email node!

parameters.content: ## Send report and cleanup Data Table

nodes.name: Sticky Note - Cleanup
nodes.notes:
DATA TABLE CLEANUP

1. Extracts all alert IDs that were analyzed
2. Marks those alerts as processed (processed = "1")
3. Fetches all alerts from the table
4. Filters for alerts that are:
   - Processed (processed = "1")
   - Older than 7 days
5. Deletes those old processed alerts

Keeps data table lean and focused on recent threats

main.node: Group Alerts by Agent and Rule
